name: Pawfect - Nature's Feast | Freeze Dried Grain Free Meat Treats for Dog -100% Natural | Human Grade | All Ages Dogs (Goat Meat, Pack of 2)- 50g Each
description: Pawfect Nature's Feast - Veritable feast of taste and nutrients made from the fine cuts of grass-fed goat meat. Universally acknowledged as the best when it comes to delighting the taste buds and supporting the healthy lifestyle of dogs. Not only these dog treats are a powerhouse of nourishment but a whole new world of uniquely delicious taste to your dog, it is so healthy and yummy that you can give it on daily basis to the furry friend.
